mapper.select: /*DisPrmtMgmtMapper.getDisPrmtDtlInfo*/ SELECT DIS.PRMT_ID AS prmtId ,DIS.PRMT_NM AS prmtNm ,DIS.STRT_DTTM AS strtDttm ,SUBSTR(DIS.STRT_DTTM, 1, 8) AS strtDt ,SUBSTR(DIS.STRT_DTTM, 9, 6) AS strtTm ,DIS.END_DTTM AS endDttm ,SUBSTR(DIS.END_DTTM, 1, 8) AS endDt ,SUBSTR(DIS.END_DTTM, 9, 6) AS endTm ,DIS.CHNL_TP AS chnlTp ,FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0090', DIS.CHNL_TP) AS chnlNm ,DIS.EVNT_CD AS evntCd ,FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0091', DIS.EVNT_CD) AS evntNm ,DIS.SLS_TP AS slsTp ,FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0093', DIS.SLS_TP) AS slsNm ,DIS.INTM_YN AS intmYn ,DIS.MODEL_ID AS modelId ,DIS.MODEL_NM AS modelNm ,DIS.ENGG_SRL AS enggSrl ,DIS.USG_YN AS usgYn ,DIS.REGST_DTTM AS regstDttm ,DIS.RVISN_DTTM AS rvisnDttm FROM MSP_DIS_MST DIS WHERE DIS.PRMT_ID = #{prmtId}

/*DisPrmtMgmtMapper.getDisPrmtDtlOrgnList*/ SELECT A.ORGN_ID AS orgnId ,B.ORGN_NM AS orgnNm FROM MSP_DIS_ORG A ,ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST B WHERE A.ORGN_ID = B.ORGN_ID AND A.PRMT_ID = #{prmtId} ORDER BY orgnNm

/*DisPrmtMgmtMapper.getDisPrmtDtlSocList*/ SELECT A.RATE_CD AS rateCd ,B.RATE_NM AS rateNm ,B.BASE_AMT AS baseAmt FROM MSP_DIS_SOC A ,MSP_RATE_MST B WHERE A.RATE_CD = B.RATE_CD AND A.PRMT_ID = #{prmtId} ORDER BY rateNm

/*DisPrmtMgmtMapper.getDisPrmtDtlAddList*/ SELECT DISTINCT A.SOC AS soc ,C.CD_DSC AS addNm ,B.BASE_AMT AS disAmt FROM MSP_DIS_ADD A ,MSP_RATE_MST B ,CMN_GRP_CD_MST C WHERE A.SOC = B.RATE_CD AND B.RATE_CD = C.CD_VAL AND C.GRP_ID = 'RCP2042' AND A.PRMT_ID = #{prmtId} ORDER BY addNm

/*DisPrmtMgmtMapper.getDisPrmtDupByInfo*/ SELECT DISTINCT A.PRMT_ID AS prmtId ,B.ORGN_ID AS orgnId ,C.RATE_CD AS rateCd FROM MSP_DIS_MST A ,MSP_DIS_ORG B ,MSP_DIS_SOC C WHERE A.USG_YN = 'Y' AND A.PRMT_ID = B.PRMT_ID AND A.PRMT_ID = C.PRMT_ID AND #{strtDttm} <= A.END_DTTM
AND #{endDttmMod} >= A.STRT_DTTM
AND #{endDttm} >= A.STRT_DTTM
AND A.EVNT_CD = #{evntCd} AND A.SLS_TP = #{slsTp} AND A.INTM_YN = #{intmYn}
AND A.MODEL_ID = #{modelId}
AND ((A.ENGG_SRL = '001218243036')
OR A.ENGG_SRL LIKE '%' || #{enggCnt0} || '%'
OR A.ENGG_SRL LIKE '%' || #{enggCnt12} || '%'
OR A.ENGG_SRL LIKE '%' || #{enggCnt18} || '%'
OR A.ENGG_SRL LIKE '%' || #{enggCnt24} || '%'
OR A.ENGG_SRL LIKE '%' || #{enggCnt30} || '%'
OR A.ENGG_SRL LIKE '%' || #{enggCnt36} || '%'
)
AND B.ORGN_ID IN (SELECT ORG.ORGN_ID FROM MSP_DIS_ORG ORG WHERE ORG.PRMT_ID = #{prmtId}) AND C.RATE_CD IN (SELECT SOC.RATE_CD FROM MSP_DIS_SOC SOC WHERE SOC.PRMT_ID = #{prmtId}) AND A.PRMT_ID NOT IN (#{prmtId})
ORDER BY B.ORGN_ID, C.RATE_CD

/*DisPrmtMgmtMapper.getDisPrmtDtlList*/ SELECT prmtId ,prmtNm ,orgnId ,orgnNm ,rateCd ,rateNm ,soc ,addNm ,disAmt FROM (
) V WHERE ROWNUM <= '100'
mapper.sql: SELECT DISTINCT A.PRMT_ID AS prmtId ,A.PRMT_NM AS prmtNm ,A.ORGN_ID AS orgnId ,B.ORGN_NM AS orgnNm ,A.RATE_CD AS rateCd ,C.RATE_NM AS rateNm ,A.SOC AS soc ,D.RATE_NM AS addNm ,D.BASE_AMT AS disAmt FROM VW_DIS_PRMT_DTL A ,ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST B ,MSP_RATE_MST C ,MSP_RATE_MST D WHERE A.PRMT_ID = #{prmtId} AND A.ORGN_ID = B.ORGN_ID AND A.RATE_CD = C.RATE_CD AND C.APPL_END_DT = '99991231' AND A.SOC = D.RATE_CD AND D.APPL_END_DT = '99991231' AND A.USG_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY B.ORGN_NM, C.RATE_NM, D.RATE_NM
mapper.select: /*DisPrmtMgmtMapper.getDisMstChk*/ SELECT COUNT(PRMT_ID) AS cnt FROM MSP_DIS_MST_CHK
mapper.insert: /*DisPrmtMgmtMapper.insertDisPrmtMstExl*/ INSERT INTO MSP_DIS_MST ( PRMT_ID ,PRMT_NM ,STRT_DTTM ,END_DTTM ,CHNL_TP ,EVNT_CD ,SLS_TP ,INTM_YN ,MODEL_ID ,MODEL_NM ,ENGG_SRL ,USG_YN ,REGST_ID ,REGST_DTTM ) SELECT PRMT_ID ,PRMT_NM ,STRT_DTTM ,END_DTTM ,CHNL_TP ,EVNT_CD ,SLS_TP ,INTM_YN ,MODEL_ID ,MODEL_NM ,ENGG_SRL ,USG_YN ,REGST_ID ,SYSDATE FROM MSP_DIS_MST_CHK
/*PromotionMapper.insertDisPrmtOrgExl*/ INSERT INTO MSP_DIS_ORG ( PRMT_ID ,ORGN_ID ,REGST_ID ,REGST_DTTM ) SELECT PRMT_ID ,ORGN_ID ,REGST_ID ,SYSDATE FROM MSP_DIS_ORG_CHK
/*PromotionMapper.insertDisPrmtSocExl*/ INSERT INTO MSP_DIS_SOC ( PRMT_ID ,RATE_CD ,REGST_ID ,REGST_DTTM ) SELECT PRMT_ID ,RATE_CD ,REGST_ID ,SYSDATE FROM MSP_DIS_SOC_CHK
/*PromotionMapper.insertDisPrmtAddExl*/ INSERT INTO MSP_DIS_ADD ( PRMT_ID ,SOC ,REGST_ID ,REGST_DTTM ) SELECT PRMT_ID ,SOC ,REGST_ID ,SYSDATE FROM MSP_DIS_ADD_CHK
mapper.select: /*DisPrmtMgmtMapper.getDisPrmtDtlOrgnCopyList*/ SELECT A.ORGN_ID AS orgnId ,B.ORGN_NM AS orgnNm ,C.CD_DSC AS typeNm ,FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0005',B.ORGN_STAT_CD) AS statNm FROM MSP_DIS_ORG A , ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST B , CMN_GRP_CD_MST C WHERE A.ORGN_ID= B.ORGN_ID AND A.PRMT_ID= #{prmtId} AND B.TYPE_DTL_CD3 = C.CD_VAL AND B.TYPE_CD = '20' AND C.GRP_ID = 'ORG0043' AND C.USG_YN = 'Y'

/*DisPrmtMgmtMapper.getDisPrmtDtlSocCopyList*/ SELECT A.RATE_CD AS rateCd ,B.RATE_NM AS rateNm ,B.BASE_AMT AS baseAmt FROM MSP_DIS_SOC A ,MSP_RATE_MST B WHERE A.RATE_CD = B.RATE_CD AND B.APPL_END_DT = '99991231' AND B.SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND B.PAY_CL_CD = 'PO' AND A.PRMT_ID = #{prmtId} ORDER BY rateNm

/*DisPrmtMgmtMapper.getDisPrmtAddCopyList*/ SELECT DISTINCT A.SOC AS soc ,B.CD_DSC AS addNm ,C.BASE_AMT AS disAmt FROM MSP_DIS_ADD A ,CMN_GRP_CD_MST B ,MSP_RATE_MST C WHERE A.SOC = B.CD_VAL AND B.CD_VAL = C.RATE_CD AND B.GRP_ID = 'RCP2042' AND C.APPL_END_DT = '99991231' AND A.PRMT_ID = #{prmtId} ORDER BY addNm
